channel.title: Games on Vineel Kovvuri
channel.description: Recent content in Games on Vineel Kovvuri

item.title: ⌨️ Typing Tutor
item.description:
Typing Tutor Arena

Choose a lesson, pick your level, and improve speed + accuracy with live feedback.

item.title: ♟️ Chess
item.description:

item.title: 🌈 Color Hunt
item.description:
Level1
Score0
Record0
Find the different color 1

One square has a slightly different shade.
Tap it as fast as you can!
10 rounds — each one gets trickier.

item.title: 🎵 Simon
item.description:

🎵 Simon

Watch the sequence,
then repeat it!

item.title: 🐍 Snake
item.description:
🐍 Snake

Eat the apples to grow longer.
Don't hit the walls or your own tail!

item.title: 🐤 Flappy Bird
item.description:
🐤 Flappy Bird

Tap, click or press Space to flap.
Fly through the gaps in the pipes!

item.title: 👾 Space Invaders
item.description:
👾 Space Invaders

Shoot the aliens before they land.
Dodge their bombs and survive!

item.title: 🔨 Whack-a-Mole
item.description:

🔨 Whack-a-Mole

Bonk the moles that pop up.
Avoid the bombs 💣 — 30 seconds on the clock!

item.title: 🔴 Connect Four
item.description: Red's turn

item.title: 🚀 Asteroids
item.description:
🚀 Asteroids

Rotate, thrust and shoot.
Blast every asteroid to clear the wave!

item.title: 🚩 Flag Frenzy
item.description:
Find the flags!

🎯0 / 20
🔥0
1 / 20
⏱10 s

Which country's flag?

item.title: 🏓 Pong
item.description:
🏓 Pong

Bounce the ball past the computer.
First to 7 points wins!

item.title: 🧱 Breakout
item.description:
🧱 Breakout

Bounce the ball with your paddle
and smash all the bricks!

item.title: 🧱 Tetris
item.description:
🧱 Tetris

Stack the falling blocks and clear full lines.
Clear 4 at once for a Tetris!
